headline: You Didn't Go to Dental School to Do Payroll at Midnight
primaryText:
It is Sunday night. You should be with your family.

Instead, you are reviewing financials, answering a text from your office manager about a staffing crisis, and wondering if it was always supposed to feel like this.

You built something real. Your patients trust you. Your team depends on you. Your name is on the door.

But somewhere between the pride and the weight, a question started forming: Is there a better way to do this?

SGA Dental Partners exists for dentists who are asking that question.

Your name stays. Your team stays. You get equity in a growing platform. And an education ecosystem -- the Pikos Institute, the 4Front Symposium -- that makes you a better clinician, not just a busier one.

Backed by the Thurston Group. 38 years. $4B+ returned to partners. 8 dental and healthcare platforms built.

Dentists come to SGA to get better. Not just to get bought.

Take the free Practice Partnership Assessment. It takes 10 minutes. Your results are yours -- no one sees them but you.

headline: 7 Out of 10 Dentists Who Sold to a DSO Regret It
primaryText:
That is not our statistic. It is what the Dentist Advisors podcast found after interviewing hundreds of dentists who took the deal.

The autonomy they were promised? Eroded.
The culture they built? Changed.
The equity they were told would grow? Underperformed.

One dentist told them: "I wish I would have never done this." He had $10 million in cash.

SGA Dental Partners was built by people who heard that number and refused to add to it.

Your name stays on the door. Your team stays in the chairs. You retain equity in a multi-state platform backed by the Thurston Group -- 38 years, $4B+ returned to partners, 8 dental platforms built.

And unlike every other DSO making the same claims: we have the Pikos Institute, the 4Front Symposium, and a clinical mentorship program that actually makes you a better dentist.

Dentists come to SGA to get better. Not just to get bought.

Download the free DSO Evaluation Checklist -- 22 questions to ask any DSO before you sign.

headline: "It Is Fun Again." -- Dr. Matt Cavendish, 20-Year Practice Owner
primaryText:
After 20 years in practice, Dr. Matt Cavendish was in what he calls "a spot of complacency."

The clinical work was competent but not exciting. The business side was exhausting. The spark had faded.

Then he partnered with SGA Dental Partners.

Through our Individual Growth Engine mentorship program, he observed his first all-on-four procedure. He learned new lab relationships. He developed capabilities he never would have pursued alone.

The results:
- Revenue up 16.5% trailing twelve months
- Staff retention: 100%
- EBITDA beating plan

His words: "It is fun again."

SGA is the only dental partnership with the Pikos Institute for world-class implant education, the 4Front Symposium for peer collaboration, and the Thurston Group's 38-year, $4B+ track record.

Dentists come to SGA to get better. Not just to get bought.

Schedule a confidential conversation. No brokers. No pressure.

headline: She Ordered a Steak for the First Time in 6 Years
primaryText:
For six years, Linda ordered the soup.

Not because she liked soup. Because her dentures could not handle anything else. She cut food into tiny pieces. She avoided restaurants. She stopped smiling in photos.

Then she met Dr. Grant Olson at Innovative Dental.

One procedure. One day. Fixed teeth that look, feel, and function like the ones she had at 30.

The first meal after? A ribeye. Medium rare. No cutting into tiny pieces. No anxiety. Just dinner.

"I forgot what it felt like to just eat," she told us.

Dental implants at Innovative Dental start with a free consultation. No obligation. No pressure.

Book your free consultation today.
linkDescription: Same-day dental implants. Free consultation. Financing from $250/month.

headline: Your Grandkids Don't Know You're Hiding Your Smile
primaryText:
You smile with your lips closed in every photo.

You say you are not hungry when the family goes out to eat.

You cover your mouth when you laugh.

Your grandkids do not know. Your spouse does. And you are tired of pretending.

Dental implants are not about vanity. They are about living without the constant background noise of "will my teeth hold?"

At Innovative Dental, Dr. Grant Olson has performed thousands of implant procedures. Same-day teeth. 3,390+ patient reviews.

Financing available from $250/month. Free consultation.

Your smile is not a luxury. It is your life.

headline: Dental Implants: What They Actually Cost (No Surprises)
primaryText:
Let us skip the part where you Google "dental implant cost" and get 47 different answers.

Here is the truth:

Full arch dental implants typically range from $20,000-$50,000 per arch.

At Innovative Dental, we believe you deserve to know the number before you walk in the door.

Here is what your consultation includes -- for free:
- 3D CT scan of your jaw
- Clinical examination by an implant specialist
- Customized treatment plan
- Transparent cost breakdown
- Financing options (from $250/month)

No surprises. No hidden fees.

3,390+ patient reviews. Dr. Grant Olson. Springfield, Missouri.

Book your free consultation.

headline: Your Mom Deserves to Eat Without Pain
primaryText:
You have watched her push food around her plate.

You have seen her wince when something is too hard to chew. You have noticed she does not smile the way she used to.

She will never ask for help. She will say "I am fine."

But you know.

Dental implants can give her back what she has been quietly losing.

At Innovative Dental, we see families like yours every week. An adult child who finally said: "Mom, let me at least get you the consultation. It is free."

One free consultation. 3D CT scan. Financing from $250/month.

headline: Why the PE Firm Behind Your DSO Matters More Than the Multiple
primaryText:
I have spent two decades in healthcare partnerships. Here is what I have learned:

The dentists who regret their DSO deal almost never regret the price. They regret who they sold to.

The PE firm determines everything: hold period, debt management, equity performance, exit outcome.

The Thurston Group: 38 years. 8 dental and healthcare platforms. $4B+ returned to partners.

SGA Dental Partners is Thurston's latest platform. Every lesson from those 38 years is built into the model.

If you are evaluating DSO options, ask three questions:
1. Who is the PE sponsor and what is their track record?
2. What have they returned across ALL platforms?
3. Can I call partners from PRIOR platforms?

If the answers are not specific, that tells you something.

#dental #DSO #practicemanagement
